requiredBehaviors: Android manifest registers FoodikeApp plus the launcher MainActivity as the application lifecycle and platform component entry surface.
Android manifest maps app label, icon, theme, backup, and start-window resources through @string/@mipmap/@style configuration.
Android manifest exposes a single launcher entry through MAIN and LAUNCHER intent-filter declarations, with no custom deep links or URI data filters.
Android manifest declares no uses-permission entries or protected platform access declarations.
Android launcher startup initializes the splash-themed entry activity and hands off app startup through the main screen lifecycle.

implementationGroups.title: Source behavior: app
requiredBehaviors: app/build.gradle.kts configures the Android application, activity, Hilt, splash, and Compose runtime needed for the source app lifecycle surface.
app/build.gradle.kts wires Navigation Compose so the single-activity app can expose onboarding, login, home, history, cart, profile, and detail routes.
app/build.gradle.kts declares no runtime-permission helper dependency or protected API build wiring.
app/build.gradle.kts provides the splashscreen and Compose entry build features that support source app startup initialization.
app/build.gradle.kts adds DataStore Preferences as the source foundation for persisted login/configuration state.
app/proguard-rules.pro contains only template comments and defines no settings-, preference-, or configuration-specific keep rules.

implementationGroups.title: Source behavior: gradle
requiredBehaviors: gradle/libs.versions.toml pins the Android plugin, Compose, Hilt, and splash/navigation dependency versions that support the source app lifecycle stack.
gradle/libs.versions.toml pins the Navigation Compose dependency that enables the source route shell.
gradle/libs.versions.toml pins splashscreen and Compose runtime versions that support source entry-screen initialization.
gradle/libs.versions.toml pins androidx.datastore preferences as the source configuration-state persistence dependency.
